title: Need help managing shared subitems between Dev & Design teams (one board, multiple phases)
excerpt:
I’m trying to manage a full workflow on one board where both our Development and Design teams work inside the same subitems. 
Each main item represents a deliverable (for example, “District Portal”), and each subitem rep…

posts.author: erikart18 (Erika Tijerina)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’m trying to manage a full workflow on one board where both our Development and Design teams work inside the same subitems.

Each main item represents a deliverable (for example, “District Portal”), and each subitem represents an individual component or page (Home, Login, Dashboard, etc.).

Here’s the challenge:

  • Both devs and designers update the same subitems, but ownership shifts depending on the phase.

  • When the parent item moves to Design, those subitems are handled by the Design team (status, proofing, etc.).

  • Once the Design phase is done, those same subitems go back to Dev for build, testing, or integration.

I want to manage that back-and-forth without duplicating boards or manually updating two places.

Has anyone set up a workflow where:

  • Subitems are shared between two teams,

  • Ownership or visibility changes based on the parent’s phase, and

  • Start/end tracking and statuses stay accurate through both phases?

I’d love to see examples or automation setups that make this kind of handoff smoother within one board. Or, if you have a great workflow with two boards that has great automations. HELP!!!

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml:
What about each team just having their own board view that’s filtered for items that are in their ‘status’? You can choose which columns to show each team on their view depending on their workload.

Desiree - www.thecleverclovers.com

posts.author: Fortimus_Team (Fortimus)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @erikart18 ,

I’d love to help you with this.

Our Mirror Item Multiple Boards app allows you to add the same item with subitems to multiple boards and keep them in sync

It includes -

  • Share item+subitem with updates+replies on multiple boards with full sync functionality
  • You can also setup complex automations like ‘When status changes to something: mirror item to Target Board Target Group’
  • Option to add a subitem as an item and keep it in sync.

To answer your question -

  • Subitems will be shared between the two teams
  • Start/end tracking and statuses stay accurate as they are live synced as the change happens
  • We can setup an automation to change the ownership/visibility based on your workflow.

Centralize your designs (7)1920×960 218 KB

Do reach out to us at support@fortimus.co, we’d love to help you get started and setup the app for exactly the workflow that you need. You can also book a meeting with us here.

posts.author: erikart18 (Erika Tijerina)
posts.cookedHtml: Thank you. I would like to avoid another purchase, if possible. I feel like what we are asking is standard and am unsure why Monday.com can’t handle something this simple. However, I will keep this app in mind if no alternative solution arises.

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: If you specifically want them to each have their own board instead of just view, then you can do what you need with a connected column and mirror columns.

posts.author: monmonday (M)
posts.cookedHtml: you could set automations that switch them back and forth between groups…

posts.author: AshutoshSingh (Ashutosh Singh)
posts.cookedHtml:
When Parent Item move to diffrent department like Design to Dev are we using diffrent board for that ?
If Yes than we can create same subitem underneath .
or if we are doing this in same board (in one board, we can use diffrent tab views for diffrent team members using same set of data just using assigning subitem design to dev
hope this make sense to you
Thanks
